reviews.review_description: I like the colors can u do numbers  letters where they make a picture?

developer_response.body:
Thank you.
Good idea about alternative differentiation approaches.
BTW, we have a similar game, where you find words by connecting letters, it's called Dots Demo ( https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/words-demo/25889518740748391/ )

reviews.review_description:
The experience revolves around grabbing, connecting, and manipulating floating colored dots.

Visually, the game is very clean and modern. The soft pastel presentation and responsive animations give it a futuristic tech-demo vibe. It feels polished, even if there is not a huge amount of content.

It would be more challenging when you could only connect a dot 1 time (1 in, 1 out). Now it is possible to connect to more then 1 dot.

I enjoyed playing the demo.
